evals.prompt: I need to create a fungible token with 8 decimals called 'GameGold' with symbol 'GG', mint 1 million initial supply to my operator account, then transfer 500 tokens to another account. Write the full JS script using @hiero-ledger/sdk.
evals.expected_output: A complete, runnable Node.js script that creates a fungible token, handles account creation/association, and transfers tokens using the Hiero SDK.

assertions.name: creates-fungible-token
assertions.description: Uses TokenCreateTransaction to create the token

assertions.name: handles-association
assertions.description: Associates recipient account with token before transfer

assertions.name: uses-transfer-transaction
assertions.description: Uses TransferTransaction for the token transfer

assertions.name: signed-amounts-correct
assertions.description: Uses negative amount for sender in token transfer

evals.prompt: Write a script that creates an NFT collection with a 5% royalty fee, mints 3 NFTs with IPFS metadata URIs, and then transfers one of them to another account. Use the Hiero SDK.
evals.expected_output: A complete script demonstrating NFT creation with royalty fees, minting with metadata, and NFT transfer.

evals.prompt: I want to airdrop a fungible token to 3 accounts — one has unlimited auto-association, one has 1 slot, and one has 0. Show me how to handle the pending airdrops (claim and cancel). JavaScript please.
evals.expected_output: A script showing the full airdrop lifecycle including pending airdrop handling with claim and cancel.

assertions.name: creates-varied-accounts
assertions.description: Creates accounts with different auto-association settings

assertions.name: accesses-pending-airdrops
assertions.description: Accesses pending airdrops from the record
